view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Fixed-duration appointments (e.g., 50 minutes)'. The evidence from the linked use case, specifically the scenario where clients see available 50-minute slots, confirms that the system supports fixed-duration appointments. Additionally, the successful booking of appointments with confirmed start and end times further supports this requirement, as seen in the 'customer-book-primary' step.
